ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan (e.g., Standard, Intermediate) */,
  "monthly_subscription" REAL /* Monthly subscription cost for the plan */,
  "free_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes included for free within the plan */,
  "price_per_minute" REAL /* Cost per minute for calls exceeding included minutes */,
  "setup_fee" TEXT /* Setup fee for new customers signing up for the plan */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Monthly management fee associated with the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the plan */,
  "max_users" INTEGER /* Maximum number of users allowed per plan */,
  "data_limit" INTEGER /* Data limit per user or total data limit for the plan */,
  "sms_included" INTEGER /* Number of SMS messages included in the plan */,
  "sms_price_per_message" REAL /* Cost per SMS message for additional usage */,
  "voice_mail_included" INTEGER /* Number of voice mail minutes included in the plan */,
  "voice_mail_price_per_minute" REAL /* Cost per voice mail minute for additional usage */,
  "international_calling" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if international calling is supported */,
  "international_call_price_per_minute" REAL /* Cost per minute for international calls */,
  "additional_features" TEXT /* JSON column for any additional features not covered by the other fields */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "subscription_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription plan the customer is on */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer account (e.g., active, suspended, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_subscription_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_plan_id") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_records" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer using the service */,
  "used_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of minutes used in the billing period */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the billing period */,
  "sms_usage" INTEGER /* Number of SMS messages used in the billing period */,
  "data_usage" INTEGER /* Amount of data used in the billing period */,
  "voice_mail_usage" INTEGER /* Number of voice mail minutes used in the billing period */,
  "international_call_usage" INTEGER /* Number of international call minutes used in the billing period */,
  "additional_charges" TEXT /* JSON column for any additional charges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_records_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer making the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the transaction */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Description of the billing cycle (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "next_billing_date" TEXT /* Next date when the customer will be billed */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support inquiry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date of the inquiry */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue raised by the customer */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry resolution (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the support agent who handled the inquiry */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was resolved */,
  "resolution_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to resolve the inquiry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_support_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer being billed */,
  "billing_cycle" TEXT /* Description of the billing cycle (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "next_billing_date" TEXT /* Next date when the customer will be billed */,
  "bill_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the bill */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill is due */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the call */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., inbound, outbound) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call in minutes */,
  "call_date" TEXT /* Date the call took place */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge incurred for the call */,
  "international_call" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the call is international */,
  "sms_count" INTEGER /* Number of SMS messages sent during the call */,
  "data_usage" INTEGER /* Amount of data used during the call */,
  "voice_mail_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of any voice mail left during the call */,
  "additional_charges" TEXT /* JSON column for any additional charges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription plan that includes this feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., call, SMS, data) */,
  "feature_limit" INTEGER /* Limit of the feature (e.g., minutes, messages, data) */,
  "feature_price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison record */,
  "plan_id_a" INTEGER /* Reference to the first subscription plan being compared */,
  "plan_id_b" INTEGER /* Reference to the second subscription plan being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date of the comparison */,
  "comparison_results" TEXT /* Results or outcomes of the comparison */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., price, features, usage) */,
  "comparison_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the comparison results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_comparisons_plan_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id_b") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_comparisons_plan_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id_a") REFERENCES subscription_plans ("plan_id")
)
